_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: On the SSIS-SEL Parent Form, ratings on the subscales of Self-Management and Relational Skills were significantly improved at post-test with medium effect sizes
resourceName: Social Skills Improvement System Social-Emotional Learning (SSIS-SEL)
details: SSIS-SEL Parent Form showed significant improvements in Self-Management and Relational Skills subscales at post-test with medium effect sizes (g = -0.60 and g = -0.65 respectively)
